userOutcome: Single execution model: always spawn agents. No serial path, no mode decision, no /implement command. Executor is the only execution entry point.
scopeSummary: Remove recommend_team_mode() from bridge.py. Remove mode field distinction from delivery runs (always 'team'). Remove /implement command. Update /plan to not reference /implement. Clean up profile_mode_preference(). Update docs.
risks: Existing features with in-progress serial runs may need migration path
readinessReason: Executor is functional (shipped). All dependencies met. Migration path: existing serial runs continue as-is; new runs always use team mode.
handoffSummary: Remove recommend_team_mode() and serial code paths from bridge.py, delivery_run.py, implement.py. Remove .claude/commands/implement.md. Update plan templates and commands that reference /implement. Add migration: existing serial runs continue as-is; new runs always use team mode.
